summary: Completed read-only provenance/source-truth completion review. Finding: DinoBrain has app-side tools and docs for source chunks, provenance links, lifecycle repair, provenance-aware reranking, and memory-use trust audits, but the current data vault contains no durable source chunks or .dino/provenance records; all accepted JSON records point only to internal task traces. Completion requires separating memory provenance from factual source truth, adding durable external/internal source chunks with citation metadata, requiring accepted claims to link to source chunks or verified trace evidence, regenerating/validating graph/provenance health against the current accepted corpus, and treating trust_score as evidence-chain quality rather than truth.
decisions: Do not treat accepted behavior memories as source-truth citations by default; they prove prior agent/task claims, not external factual correctness.
All currently inspected accepted records are source_status=internal and resolve to .dino/traces/*; this is acceptable for agent behavior memory but insufficient for external facts or public claims.
Completion should require real 30_Sources/chunks/* records plus .dino/provenance/* links for factual claims, external evidence, citations, and last_verified metadata.

Graph/provenance health is currently stale or incomplete: graph-health reports zero accepted instances while wiki-index contains the accepted corpus, so completion requires regenerated health metrics and failing checks for missing source chunks/provenance.
Trust scoring should remain an audit of provided/declared/observed memory use, not a truth score.
next_steps: Implement or run a provenance backfill/review pass that classifies accepted records into behavior memory, local operational fact, external fact, and public/user-sensitive claim.
Create durable source chunks and provenance links for external factual claims and high-risk operational claims, with source_uri, chunk_text, last_verified, and citation fields.
Update graph-health/Observatory completion gates so missing 30_Sources/chunks and .dino/provenance records are visible and fail source-truth readiness.
Add verification that Context Packs can return citations/source chunks alongside accepted memories and distinguish memory evidence from source evidence.
search_queries: provenance source truth durable source chunks citations trust scoring accepted instances
